description: Show badge icons before file names in the explorer based on note property (frontmatter) rules. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: runnerback
manifest.description: Show badge icons before file names in the explorer based on note property (frontmatter) rules. Configure multiple rule groups with AND/OR conditions, each mapped to a built-in brand icon or your own uploaded image.
manifest.name: Property Icons

name: Property Icons

releases.author: runnerback
releases.description:
## Property Icons 0.1.0

First release.

Show badge icons before file names in Obsidian's file explorer, driven by note property (frontmatter) rules.

### Features
- **Rule groups** — create any number of rule groups, each a set of `property = value` conditions.
- **AND / OR per group** — choose whether all conditions must match (AND) or any (OR).
- **Multiple icons** — a file that matches several groups shows several badges, in order.
- **Built-in brand icons** — bilibili, Xiaohongshu, YouTube, Douyin, Weibo, WeChat, X, Instagram.
- **Custom icons** — upload your own image (jpg / jpeg / png / svg) and use it as a badge.
- **Bilingual UI** — English by default, auto-switches to Chinese when Obsidian is set to Chinese.
- **Live updates** — badges refresh instantly when a note's properties change, and survive file-tree scrolling.

### Notes
- Conditions use exact string equality. For a list property, the condition matches when any element equals the value.
- Built-in icons are simplified brand glyphs; platform names and logos are trademarks of their respective owners. Use the custom-upload feature for exact official logos.
releases.name: Property Icons
